title: cyperus houghtonii
intro: Cyperus houghtonii, also known as the Houghton's flatsedge, is a species of sedge that is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus houghtonii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, which are used to administer its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically verified.
